raw_text: Hi, this is Ward 3B. There's been a fluid spill in the bay 4 bathroom and it needs a cleanup before the next patient is moved in. Could someone from environmental services come up when they get a chance? Thanks.

classification.reasoning: A fluid spill in a patient bathroom requires environmental services cleanup before room reuse—a routine facility task with a standard service-level agreement, but not an immediate safety hazard if the area is isolated.

actions.detail: Extracted details — location: Ward 3B, Bay 4 bathroom, requester: Ward 3B staff.
Routed to Facilities & Environmental Services — work order issued.

Hi, this is Ward 3B. There's been a fluid spill in the bay 4 bathroom and it needs a cleanup before the next patient is moved in. Could someone from environmental services come up when they get a chance? Thanks.

actions.detail: Confirmation message drafted for the requester.
actions.artifact:
Thank you for reaching out. We have logged a cleanup request for the Bay 4 bathroom on Ward 3B and routed it to the Environmental Services team right away. A team member will attend to the area within the standard service window.

If the situation changes or you need to provide any additional details, please don't hesitate to contact the operations desk and we'll update the request accordingly. We appreciate you flagging this promptly.
